subject: Galarian Meowth, a scruffy grey cat-like Pokemon with a hardened metallic coin on its forehead, in an aggressive mid-action pose amid crashing waves or water splash
description: A scruffy, unkempt cat-like creature with long shaggy grey-brown fur stands in a combative forward posture amid a swirling burst of water or ocean waves. Its forehead bears a large, hardened, darkened coin — a signature trait. Claws appear visible and extended. The fur appears matted and wild, giving an impression of a hardened, seafaring creature rather than a domestic cat. The background is dominated by blue-grey water and spray.
foreground: Shaggy grey cat-like creature with metallic forehead coin, claws extended, amid water spray
background: Crashing water, ocean spray, blue-grey tones
